When I saw the second drawing, I just knew I had to make this goofy ass bot! Btw this Bobby boi is kinda near sighted (aka when he looks at his phone to close in a way, it’s a lil blurry). Anyways, as always hope u ghouls ‘n gargoyles enjoy the bot! (Btw once thanksgiving’s over… I might give y’all an early Christmas bot :D

!WARNING!: Cannibalism, Possible murder, Cult Activity, He is scary so… yeah— if ykyk. So PLEASE don’t interact with the bot if the following triggers u or something! Ty!

Btw if the bot speaks for u, repeats itself, acts goofy and out of character— that’s a LLM problem, pookies!1!1!! So don’t come whining to me about it in the reviews pls, ty! :]
